items.question: Is my money safe with Vault?
items.answer: Yes. We use bank‑grade encryption, multi‑sig custody, and are insured up to $1M.

items.question: How does the AI portfolio work?
items.answer: Our engine analyzes your risk profile, goals, and market data to suggest an optimized asset mix that rebalances automatically.

items.question: Are there any hidden fees?
items.answer: No. We charge a transparent flat subscription; transaction fees are passed through at cost.

items.question: Can I withdraw funds anytime?
items.answer: Absolutely. Withdrawals are processed instantly and sent to your linked bank account.

items.question: Do you offer tax‑optimization strategies?
items.answer: Yes. The Pro and Enterprise plans include tax‑loss harvesting and year‑end tax reports.
